incidents._mock_note: CLOSED-1 | Type A (explicit data source) | Core Banking - Transaction Ledger
incidents.short_description: (AutoTkt) PL-CB-04-TRANSACTION-LEDGER-DAILY-INGEST failure in ADF
incidents.description: Automated alert: the ADF pipeline PL-CB-04-TRANSACTION-LEDGER-DAILY-INGEST failed during its scheduled run. The copy activity for the Core Banking Transaction Ledger segment timed out against the source. No data landed for int_core_banking.transaction_ledger and cur_core_banking.transaction_ledger is stale. Source file transaction_ledger_extract.dat was not available within the ingest window.
incidents.resolution_notes: ADF copy activity timed out because the Core Banking source system was slow. Re-triggered PL-CB-04-TRANSACTION-LEDGER-DAILY-INGEST after source recovered. Data landed in int_core_banking.transaction_ledger, CUR layer refreshed, and row counts reconciled across RAW, INT, and CUR.

incidents._mock_note: CLOSED-2 | Type B (key fields only - needs STTM lookup) | Debit Card - Transaction Clearing
incidents.short_description: Duplicate clearing_txn_id values detected in cur_txn_clearing after partial retry
incidents.description: A downstream analytics query flagged 14,200 duplicate clearing_txn_id values in the Debit Card cur_txn_clearing table. The duplicates appeared after a partial retry of the INT-to-CUR pipeline. The clearing_txn_id column is the business key for this segment. Investigation confirmed that the retry re-inserted rows already committed in int_txn_clearing without a merge-on-key guard.
incidents.resolution_notes: Duplicate rows caused by partial retry without idempotency guard. Deduplicated cur_txn_clearing on clearing_txn_id. Added merge-on-key idempotency check (MERGE INTO logic keyed on clearing_txn_id) to the INT-to-CUR pipeline to prevent duplicate inserts on retry.

incidents._mock_note: CLOSED-3 | Type A (explicit data source) | Loan Application - Applicant Master
incidents.short_description: Loan Application Applicant Master schema drift - app_master.dat has 3 new columns
incidents.description: After a source system release, the Loan Application Applicant Master file app_master.dat added 3 new columns not present in the STTM. The ADF pipeline PL-LA-01-APP-MASTER-RAW-INGEST failed on schema validation. int_app_master was not refreshed. The STTM for Loan Application defines 31 raw attributes for the APP_MASTER segment but the source now sends 34.
incidents.resolution_notes: Schema drift from source system release. Loan Application STTM updated from 31 to 34 raw attributes for APP_MASTER segment. Pipeline schema validation rule adjusted. Re-ran PL-LA-01-APP-MASTER-RAW-INGEST. INT and CUR layers refreshed. Row counts reconciled. No data loss.

incidents._mock_note: CLOSED-4 | Type B (key fields only - needs STTM lookup) | Real Estate Pricing - Comparable Sales Master
incidents.short_description: Concurrent write conflict on cur_rel.comparable_sales_master Delta table during merge
incidents.description: The Real Estate Pricing INT-to-CUR delta merge step for cur_rel.comparable_sales_master threw a ConcurrentAppendException. The merge was processing comparable_sales.dat records when an overlapping Databricks job attempted to write to the same Delta table partition. The subject-property-to-comp grain data did not reach the Curated layer. Downstream pricing_adjustments_forecasts pipeline also failed because it depends on refreshed comps data.
incidents.resolution_notes: ConcurrentAppendException caused by overlapping job schedules on the same Delta table partition. Serialized the merge step for cur_rel.comparable_sales_master to prevent concurrent writes. Adjusted Databricks job scheduling to avoid overlap. Retried pipeline and Curated layer refreshed. Downstream pricing_adjustments_forecasts completed successfully. No data loss.

incidents._mock_note: CLOSED-5 | Type A (explicit data source) | Payments Enterprise - Payment Transactions
incidents.short_description: Payments Enterprise payment_txn_src daily file missing from landing zone
incidents.description: The Payments Enterprise payment_txn_src daily SFTP file was not delivered to abfss://landing@prod/payments/txn/ for the 2026-05-15 cycle. This is the core payment transactions feed from the gateway and processor. Without it, raw.payments_payment_txn was not loaded and the INT and Curated layers were not refreshed. Downstream settlement matching, chargeback analytics, and merchant reporting were all stale.
incidents.resolution_notes: Payment gateway SFTP job failed due to credential expiry. Credentials renewed, file re-delivered, and pipeline backfilled. All layers refreshed. No data loss. Added file-arrival SLA monitor for payment_txn_src.

incidents._mock_note: OPEN-1 | Type B (key fields only - needs STTM lookup) | Core Banking - Account Balance Snapshot
incidents.short_description: Core Banking - Row count mismatch on snapshot_date key in cur_core_banking.account_balance_snapshot
incidents.description: Source-to-target reconciliation flagged a row count mismatch. The daily extract had 103,000 rows but only 98,412 landed in the CUR table keyed on snapshot_date. The INT-to-CUR transformation is dropping records where snapshot_date is null. The STTM defines snapshot_date as the primary business key for this segment and it should never be null in the source, but 4,588 records arrived with null values. Downstream balance reporting is incomplete.

incidents._mock_note: OPEN-2 | Type A (explicit data source) | Core Banking - KYC Profile
incidents.short_description: Core Banking KYC Profile - 8 PII fields loaded unencrypted in int_core_banking.kyc_profile
incidents.description: The Core Banking KYC Profile segment (kyc_profile_extract.dat) loaded into int_core_banking.kyc_profile without the required encryption on 8 PII-sensitive fields. The STTM specifies Sensitive Field Count = 8 for this segment including national_id, passport_number, and tax_id. A pipeline configuration change on PL-CB-11-KYC-PROFILE-RAW-INT disabled the encryption data flow. Security team has been notified of the exposure window.
incidents.resolution_notes: Pipeline configuration change inadvertently disabled PII encryption. Re-enabled encryption data flow in PL-CB-11-KYC-PROFILE-RAW-INT. Purged unencrypted records from int_core_banking.kyc_profile and reprocessed. All 8 PII fields now encrypted. Security incident report filed. Awaiting security team sign-off to close.

incidents._mock_note: OPEN-3 | Type A (explicit data source) | Debit Card - Cardholder Master
incidents.short_description: Debit Card Cardholder Master PII masking failure in INT layer after deployment
incidents.description: The Debit Card Cardholder Master segment loaded into int_cardholder_master without applying the required PII masking on sensitive fields. The STTM specifies 9 PII-sensitive fields for this segment including cardholder_name, card_number, and date_of_birth. The ADF pipeline PL-DC-01-CARDHOLDER-MASTER-RAW-INT skipped the masking step due to a linked service misconfiguration after the latest deployment to DebitCard_PROD_AzureDataFactory.

incidents._mock_note: OPEN-4 | Type B (key fields only - needs STTM lookup) | Debit Card - Fraud Alerts
incidents.short_description: int_fraud_alerts stale - fraud_alert_id records not refreshed for 2 days
incidents.description: The Debit Card int_fraud_alerts table has not been refreshed in 2 consecutive days. The last successful load timestamp for fraud_alert_id is 2026-05-30 and no new records have arrived since. The source file has not landed at the expected raw path. The vendor providing the fraud alert feed acknowledged a system outage on their side. cur_fraud_alerts is also stale and downstream fraud analytics are running on outdated data.

incidents._mock_note: OPEN-5 | Type B (key fields only - needs STTM lookup) | Loan Application - Underwriting Decision
incidents.short_description: cur_underwriting missing 2,400 records - null underwriting_decision_status in INT-to-CUR
incidents.description: The Loan Application cur_underwriting table is missing 2,400 application records. The INT-to-CUR transformation dropped records where the derived field underwriting_decision_status was null. The source file underwriting.dat loaded correctly into int_underwriting but the derivation logic for underwriting_decision_status was not applied after a recent pipeline update. The STTM defines this as a derived field with a CASE WHEN business rule, but the rule is returning null for a subset of records.

incidents._mock_note: OPEN-6 | Type A (explicit data source) | Real Estate Pricing - Property Valuation Master
incidents.short_description: Real Estate Pricing Property Valuation Master - AVM vendor API returning HTTP 503
incidents.description: The Real Estate Pricing Property Valuation Master segment failed to ingest. The AVM vendor API extract for valuation_master.dat has been returning HTTP 503 for 6 consecutive hours. No data has landed at /mnt/landing/rel/vendor/valuation/ and the tables raw_rel.valuation, int_rel.property_valuation_master, and cur_rel.property_valuation_master are stale. This is impacting downstream pricing benchmark calculations and the Comparable Sales Master pipeline which depends on refreshed valuation data.

incidents._mock_note: OPEN-7 | Type B (key fields only - needs STTM lookup) | Real Estate Pricing - Neighborhood Market Trends
incidents.short_description: raw_rel.neighborhood partial load - only 15 of 42 census tracts landed
incidents.description: The Real Estate Pricing monthly reference dataset load into raw_rel.neighborhood is incomplete. Only 15 of the expected 42 census tracts landed after the blob transfer from /mnt/landing/rel/reference/neighborhood/. The file neighborhood_trends.dat appears truncated. int_rel.neighborhood_market_trends and cur_rel.neighborhood_market_trends have incomplete neighborhood-level data, affecting price adjustment calculations for 27 missing tracts.

incidents._mock_note: OPEN-8 | Type B (key fields only - needs STTM lookup) | Relationship Manager - Customer Master
incidents.short_description: int_rm_customer_master truncated - customer_id count 62K vs expected 100K+
incidents.description: The Relationship Manager int_rm_customer_master table shows only 62,000 customer_id records instead of the expected 100,000+. The daily mainframe batch extract appears to have been truncated during the SFTP transfer to /landing/rm/customer_master/. The copybook RM_01_CUSTOMER_MASTER_CPY was applied but the resulting INT table is incomplete. cur_rm_customer_master is also short by approximately 38,000 records, impacting downstream customer relationship analytics.

incidents._mock_note: OPEN-9 | Type B (key fields only - needs STTM lookup) | Customer Enterprise - Customer Interaction
incidents.short_description: raw.customer_cust_interaction 4-hour lag - interaction_id offset growing
incidents.description: The Customer Enterprise raw.customer_cust_interaction table is lagging by 4 hours. The consumer group offset for interaction_id is growing, with the last processed interaction_ts timestamp 4 hours behind real time. Records are not landing at abfss://landing@prod/customer/interaction/ in a timely manner. The hourly micro-batch ingestion appears to be backed up. INT and Curated layers for customer interaction data are stale, impacting customer contact event analytics.

incidents._mock_note: OPEN-10 | Type B (key fields only - needs STTM lookup) | Payments Enterprise - Settlement Batches
incidents.short_description: settlement_batch_id count mismatch in raw.payments_settlement - 47 batches missing
incidents.description: The settlement_batch_id counts in raw.payments_settlement do not match the control totals provided by the processor. 47 settlement batches are missing from the INT layer. The daily feed delivered to abfss://landing@prod/payments/settlement/ appears truncated. Downstream chargeback reconciliation and merchant analytics are impacted because settlement matching depends on complete batch data. The settlement_updated_ts for the last valid batch is 6 hours behind expected.

incidents._mock_note: OPEN-11 | Logistics Enterprise - Shipment Line | Added for Summarize intent
incidents.short_description: Logistics shipment_line_src records not loading - delimiter mismatch in Landing-to-Raw
incidents.description: The Logistics Enterprise shipment_line_src daily feed landed at abfss://landing@prod/logistics/shipment_line/ but records are not parsing into raw.logistics_shipment_line. The Landing-to-Raw hop is failing because the source switched from comma-delimited to pipe-delimited JSON without notice. All 13 mapped columns (shipment_line_id, shipment_id, sku_id, quantity, unit_price, line_status, etc.) are returning null in the RAW table. The STTM Hop1_Landing_Raw mapping expects trim(source) transformations on string fields and cast() on decimals, but the parser cannot split fields due to the delimiter change. INT and Curated layers have zero new shipment line records for today. Shipment header data (shipment_src) is unaffected.

incidents._mock_note: CLOSED-6 | HOP Enterprise - SRC_ORDERS DQ failures | Added for Summarize intent
incidents.short_description: HOP Enterprise SRC_ORDERS - 2,800 records failing DQ on order_amt during Raw-to-INT
incidents.description: The HOP Enterprise SRC_ORDERS feed had 2,800 records fail DQ validation during the Raw-to-INT hop (Hop2). The DQ_Rules tab in the HOP STTM specifies order_amt as mandatory with a Not Null check and datatype decimal(18,2). The source sent empty strings in the order_amt field for these records, causing the cast(trim(source) as decimal(18,2)) transformation to fail. The records were quarantined in the DQ error table and did not reach the INT layer (int.orders). Curated layer was also short by 2,800 orders. The source team confirmed a bug in their extraction job that sent empty strings instead of 0.00 for zero-value orders.
incidents.resolution_notes: Source extraction bug sent empty strings for zero-value order_amt. Source team patched extraction to send 0.00. Re-extracted and reloaded 2,800 records. DQ validation passed. INT and Curated layers reconciled. Added coalesce(order_amt, 0.00) as defensive default in the Raw-to-INT transformation per STTM Mapping Rules Default logic type.

incidents._mock_note: OPEN-12 | Pipeline Failure | Core Banking - Deposit Account Master | Added for Pipeline Incidents intent
incidents.short_description: (AutoTkt) PL-CB-02-DEPOSIT-ACCT-MASTER-RAW-INGEST pipeline failed - auth token expired
incidents.description: Automated alert: ADF pipeline PL-CB-02-DEPOSIT-ACCT-MASTER-RAW-INGEST failed at the copy activity step. The service principal auth token used to connect to the Core Banking source system expired overnight. The pipeline could not pull deposit_account_master_extract.dat from the source. int_core_banking.deposit_account_master and cur_core_banking.deposit_account_master are stale. This is a pipeline infrastructure failure, not a data quality issue - the source data is available but the pipeline cannot authenticate to retrieve it.

incidents._mock_note: OPEN-13 | Pipeline Failure | Debit Card - Merchant Master | Added for Pipeline Incidents intent
incidents.short_description: PL-DC-07-MERCHANT-MASTER-RAW-INT pipeline failed - linked service connection refused
incidents.description: The ADF pipeline PL-DC-07-MERCHANT-MASTER-RAW-INT failed during the data flow step. The linked service to the Debit Card INT database returned a connection refused error. All records from raw_merchant_master could not be transformed into int_merchant_master. The cur_merchant_master table is stale, impacting downstream merchant enrichment for transaction authorization and clearing segments. The pipeline has been failing since the 2026-06-02 scheduled run. Other Debit Card pipelines connecting to the same INT database are also at risk.

incidents._mock_note: OPEN-14 | Pipeline Failure | Loan Application - Repayment Schedule | Added for Pipeline Incidents intent
incidents.short_description: (AutoTkt) PL-LA-12-REPAY-SCHEDULE-RAW-INGEST aborted - source connection timeout
incidents.description: Automated alert: ADF pipeline PL-LA-12-REPAY-SCHEDULE-RAW-INGEST aborted after 3 consecutive retry failures. The copy activity could not establish a connection to the Loan Application source system to pull repay_schedule.dat from /mnt/raw/loan_application/repay_schedule/. The source system appears to be under heavy load during month-end batch processing. int_repay_schedule and cur_repay_schedule have not been refreshed. Downstream repayment analytics are stale. The pipeline is configured with 3 retries at 10-minute intervals, all of which timed out.

incidents._mock_note: CLOSED-7 | Vendor outage historical | Debit Card - POS Terminal Master | Added for Historical Resolution intent
incidents.short_description: Debit Card POS Terminal Master feed delayed - vendor maintenance window
incidents.description:
The Debit Card POS Terminal Master daily feed 
      (pos_terminal_master.dat) was not delivered for 2 consecutive days. 
      The vendor providing the POS terminal reference data had an unannounced
       maintenance window. raw_pos_terminal_master, int_pos_terminal_master, 
              and cur_pos_terminal_master were stale. Downstream ATM Activity and Transaction Authorization enrichment were running on outdated terminal data, causing mismatches in terminal_id lookups.
incidents.resolution_notes: Vendor outage caused 2-day feed gap. Resolution steps: (1) Confirmed with vendor that maintenance was complete. (2) Vendor re-delivered pos_terminal_master.dat for both missed days. (3) Re-triggered PL-DC-11-POS-TERMINAL-RAW-INGEST for backfill. (4) Validated row counts across RAW, INT, CUR. Terminal_id lookups reconciled. (5) Added vendor maintenance schedule to DEPS monitoring calendar. (6) Configured file-arrival SLA alert at 24-hour threshold so delayed feeds are flagged before downstream pipelines run on stale data.

incidents._mock_note: CLOSED-8 | Kafka lag historical | Customer Enterprise - Customer Interaction | Added for Historical Resolution intent
incidents.short_description: Customer Enterprise customer_interaction_src Kafka consumer rebalancing caused 6-hour lag
incidents.description: The Customer Enterprise customer_interaction_src Kafka micro-batch ingestion experienced a 6-hour lag after a broker restart triggered a consumer group rebalancing storm. The consumer group for interaction_id events lost its partition assignments repeatedly, causing the offset to fall behind. Records stopped landing at abfss://landing@prod/customer/interaction/ and raw.customer_cust_interaction went stale. INT and Curated customer interaction tables were not refreshed during the lag window.
incidents.resolution_notes: Kafka consumer group rebalancing storm after broker restart. Resolution steps: (1) Increased session.timeout.ms from 10s to 45s to prevent premature partition revocation. (2) Increased max.poll.interval.ms from 300s to 600s to allow longer processing windows. (3) Set group.instance.id for static membership to avoid unnecessary rebalances on transient disconnects. (4) Consumer backlog cleared within 2 hours of config push. All interaction events caught up and INT/Curated layers refreshed. (5) Added consumer lag alerting at 2-hour threshold on the interaction_id topic. (6) Documented Kafka tuning parameters in the platform runbook.

incidents._mock_note: DC-DQ-1 | Cardholder Master | Missing data - completeness
incidents.short_description: cur_cardholder_master missing 3,200 records - null cardholder_id dropped during INT-to-CUR
incidents.description: Missing data: source-to-target reconciliation on the Debit Card Cardholder Master segment flagged 3,200 records missing from cur_cardholder_master. The daily extract delivered 85,000 records but only 81,800 landed in the CUR table. The INT-to-CUR transformation is dropping records where cardholder_id is null. The STTM defines cardholder_id as the primary business key and it should never be null, but the source sent 3,200 records with empty cardholder_id values. Downstream cardholder analytics and card-to-customer linkage reports are incomplete.
incidents.resolution_notes: Root cause: source extraction bug sent empty cardholder_id for batch of newly onboarded cardholders. Source team patched extraction. 3,200 records re-extracted and reloaded. Row counts reconciled across RAW, INT, CUR. Added NOT NULL assertion on cardholder_id in the DQ rules layer.

incidents._mock_note: DC-DQ-2 | Cardholder Master | Missing data - timeliness
incidents.short_description: int_cardholder_master stale - daily feed not delivered for 18 hours past SLA
incidents.description: Missing data: the Debit Card Cardholder Master daily feed (cardholder_master.dat) has not been delivered to the landing zone for 18 hours past the expected SLA window. The last successful load timestamp is 2026-05-20 02:00:00. raw_cardholder_master, int_cardholder_master, and cur_cardholder_master are all stale. Downstream card issuance reports and cardholder verification lookups are running on day-old data. The source system batch job appears to be hung.

incidents._mock_note: DC-DQ-3 | Cardholder Master | Missing data - completeness partial file
incidents.short_description: raw_cardholder_master partial load - only 40K of expected 85K records landed
incidents.description: Missing data: the Debit Card Cardholder Master file cardholder_master.dat was only partially delivered. 40,000 records landed in raw_cardholder_master versus the expected 85,000. The file appears truncated at the SFTP transfer stage. int_cardholder_master and cur_cardholder_master are missing approximately 45,000 cardholder records. Card issuance and activation reports are incomplete. The SFTP transfer log shows the connection was reset mid-transfer.
incidents.resolution_notes: SFTP connection reset during file transfer caused truncation. Re-initiated SFTP transfer after network stabilization. Full 85,000 records delivered and loaded. Row counts reconciled across RAW, INT, CUR. Added file-size validation check before pipeline trigger to catch truncated files.

incidents._mock_note: DC-DQ-4 | Debit Card Account | Missing data - completeness
incidents.short_description: cur_debit_card_account missing 1,800 records - account_id null in source extract
incidents.description: Missing data: the Debit Card Account segment shows 1,800 records missing from cur_debit_card_account. The source extract had 102,000 records but only 100,200 reached the CUR layer. The INT-to-CUR step dropped records where account_id was null. The STTM defines account_id as the primary business key for this segment. Source team confirmed a migration script left 1,800 newly created debit card accounts without account_id values. Downstream account balance and card-to-account linkage reporting are incomplete.
incidents.resolution_notes: Source migration script bug left null account_id for 1,800 new accounts. Source team patched and re-extracted. Records reloaded into RAW, INT, CUR. Row counts reconciled. Added source-side NOT NULL constraint on account_id.

incidents._mock_note: DC-DQ-5 | Debit Card Account | Missing data - timeliness
incidents.short_description: Debit Card Account daily refresh 12 hours late - source batch job scheduling conflict
incidents.description: Missing data: the Debit Card Account daily extract has not arrived for 12 hours past the expected delivery window. The source system batch scheduler reports a job conflict that delayed the debit_card_account_extract.dat generation. raw_debit_card_account, int_debit_card_account, and cur_debit_card_account have not been refreshed since yesterday. Account status checks and card activation workflows are running on stale account data.
incidents.resolution_notes: Source batch job conflict resolved by adjusting job priority. Extract delivered 12 hours late. Pipeline backfilled. RAW, INT, CUR layers refreshed. Row counts reconciled. Requested source team add dedicated job slot for debit card account extract to prevent recurrence.

incidents._mock_note: DC-DQ-6 | Debit Card Account | Missing data - completeness zero records
incidents.short_description: int_debit_card_account loaded zero records - empty source file delivered
incidents.description: Missing data: the Debit Card Account segment loaded zero records into int_debit_card_account. The source file debit_card_account_extract.dat was delivered on time but contained only the header row with no data rows. raw_debit_card_account has the header but zero data records. cur_debit_card_account was not refreshed. All downstream account-level reporting and card-to-account linkage are missing today's data. The source system appears to have generated an empty extract.
incidents.resolution_notes: Source system generated empty extract due to database connection pool exhaustion during batch window. Source DBA team resolved connection pool issue. File re-extracted with full 102,000 records. Pipeline re-triggered and all layers refreshed. Awaiting validation sign-off to close.

incidents._mock_note: DC-DQ-7 | Card Profile | Missing data - completeness
incidents.short_description: cur_card_profile missing 950 records - card_id values not matching join condition in INT-to-CUR
incidents.description: Missing data: 950 records are missing from cur_card_profile after the INT-to-CUR transformation. The records exist in int_card_profile but were dropped because their card_id values did not match any cardholder_id in the join lookup against int_cardholder_master. The STTM Join_Lookups tab requires card_profile to join on cardholder_id. These 950 cards belong to a newly onboarded card program whose cardholder records have not yet been loaded. Downstream card utilization and spend analytics are incomplete.
incidents.resolution_notes: 950 card_profile records dropped because corresponding cardholder_master records were not yet loaded for the new card program. Coordinated load sequence: cardholder_master loaded first, then card_profile re-processed. All 950 records now in CUR. Added dependency check to ensure cardholder_master loads before card_profile INT-to-CUR runs.

incidents._mock_note: DC-DQ-8 | Card Profile | Missing data - timeliness
incidents.short_description: raw_card_profile not refreshed for 2 days - SFTP credentials expired
incidents.description: Missing data: the Debit Card Card Profile segment has not been refreshed for 2 consecutive days. The source file card_profile.dat has not landed at the expected raw path. The SFTP service account credentials used to pull the file expired on 2026-05-25. raw_card_profile, int_card_profile, and cur_card_profile are all stale. Card status and card feature reporting are running on 2-day-old data. New card activations and profile updates are not reflected.
incidents.resolution_notes: SFTP credentials expired. Renewed credentials with 12-month validity. Backfilled 2 missing days of card_profile.dat. RAW, INT, CUR layers refreshed. Row counts reconciled. Added credential expiry alerting at 30-day threshold.

incidents._mock_note: DC-DQ-9 | Card Profile | Missing data - completeness null key fields
incidents.short_description: int_card_profile 2,100 records with null card_id - source system upgrade side effect
incidents.description: Missing data: 2,100 records in int_card_profile have null card_id after the latest source system upgrade. The STTM defines card_id as the primary business key for this segment. The source system upgrade changed the card_id generation sequence, leaving 2,100 in-flight card applications without assigned card_id values. These records are present in raw_card_profile but were quarantined during INT DQ validation. cur_card_profile is short by 2,100 records. Card provisioning and activation tracking are incomplete.

incidents._mock_note: DC-DQ-10 | Card Status History | Missing data - completeness
incidents.short_description: cur_card_status_history missing 7 days of status transitions - card_status_hist_id gap detected
incidents.description: Missing data: the Debit Card Card Status History segment is missing 7 days of status transition records in cur_card_status_history. A gap in card_status_hist_id values indicates that status change events from 2026-05-10 through 2026-05-16 were never loaded. The source system was generating the events but the extraction job was silently skipping them due to an incorrect watermark timestamp. Approximately 14,000 status transitions are missing. Card lifecycle reporting and fraud detection rules that depend on status change velocity are affected.
incidents.resolution_notes: Source extraction watermark was incorrectly advanced past 7 days of status events. Reset watermark to 2026-05-10. Backfilled 14,000 status transition records. RAW, INT, CUR reconciled. Added daily card_status_hist_id sequence gap monitoring to catch silent skips.

incidents._mock_note: DC-DQ-11 | Card Status History | Missing data - timeliness
incidents.short_description: int_card_status_history 36-hour refresh lag - batch extract delayed by mainframe maintenance
incidents.description: Missing data: the Debit Card Card Status History table int_card_status_history has a 36-hour refresh lag. The mainframe batch extract that generates card_status_history.dat was delayed due to an unscheduled mainframe maintenance window. No new card status transition records have been delivered since 2026-06-08 18:00:00. cur_card_status_history is equally stale. Card block/unblock operations performed in the last 36 hours are not reflected in downstream reporting.

incidents._mock_note: DC-DQ-12 | Transaction Authorization | Missing data - completeness
incidents.short_description: cur_txn_authorization missing 22,000 records - auth_txn_id count mismatch vs processor totals
incidents.description: Missing data: the Debit Card Transaction Authorization segment shows a 22,000-record shortfall in cur_txn_authorization compared to the processor's control totals. The daily authorization feed delivered 450,000 records but only 428,000 reached the CUR layer. The INT-to-CUR transformation dropped records where the auth_response_code field was an unexpected value ('ZZ') not handled by the CASE WHEN derivation logic. The STTM defines auth_txn_id as the primary business key. Downstream authorization approval rate reporting and real-time fraud scoring are incomplete.

incidents._mock_note: DC-DQ-13 | Transaction Authorization | Missing data - timeliness
incidents.short_description: raw_txn_authorization 8-hour lag - real-time auth feed Kafka topic partition reassignment
incidents.description: Missing data: the Debit Card Transaction Authorization real-time feed has an 8-hour lag. The Kafka topic partition for authorization events was reassigned during a broker scaling event and the consumer group lost its offsets. No new auth_txn_id records have landed in raw_txn_authorization since 2026-05-30 22:00:00. int_txn_authorization and cur_txn_authorization are stale. Real-time fraud detection and authorization decline monitoring are running on 8-hour-old data.
incidents.resolution_notes: Kafka partition reassignment during broker scaling caused consumer offset loss. Reset consumer offsets to the last committed position. Consumer caught up within 3 hours. All 8 hours of backlogged authorization events processed. RAW, INT, CUR refreshed. Added static consumer group membership to prevent offset loss during rebalancing.

incidents._mock_note: DC-DQ-14 | Transaction Authorization | Missing data - completeness null auth codes
incidents.short_description: int_txn_authorization 5,400 records quarantined - null auth_txn_id from processor feed
incidents.description: Missing data: 5,400 records from the Debit Card Transaction Authorization feed were quarantined in the DQ error table during Raw-to-INT processing. The auth_txn_id field, defined as the primary business key in the STTM, was null for these records. The payment processor confirmed a formatting issue in their batch extract that truncated the auth_txn_id column for transactions processed through a specific gateway node. These 5,400 authorizations are missing from int_txn_authorization and cur_txn_authorization. Merchant settlement reconciliation is affected.
incidents.resolution_notes: Processor gateway node formatting bug truncated auth_txn_id. Processor patched and re-sent corrected feed. 5,400 records reloaded and DQ validation passed. RAW, INT, CUR reconciled. Added auth_txn_id format validation at landing zone to reject malformed records early.

incidents._mock_note: DC-DQ-15 | Transaction Clearing | Missing data - completeness
incidents.short_description: cur_txn_clearing missing 8,500 clearing records - clearing_txn_id null after processor system change
incidents.description: Missing data: 8,500 records are missing from cur_txn_clearing. The payment processor made an unannounced system change that altered the clearing_txn_id format from numeric to alphanumeric. The STTM DQ rule expects a numeric cast on clearing_txn_id during Raw-to-INT, and the new alphanumeric values failed the cast. Records were quarantined. int_txn_clearing and cur_txn_clearing are short by 8,500 clearing transactions. Settlement matching and reconciliation are incomplete.
incidents.resolution_notes: Processor changed clearing_txn_id format to alphanumeric. Updated STTM DQ rule to accept alphanumeric clearing_txn_id. Re-processed 8,500 quarantined records. RAW, INT, CUR reconciled. Coordinated with processor to receive advance notice of schema changes.

incidents._mock_note: DC-DQ-16 | Transaction Clearing | Missing data - timeliness
incidents.short_description: int_txn_clearing not refreshed for 24 hours - clearing file delivery SLA breach
incidents.description: Missing data: the Debit Card Transaction Clearing daily file has not been delivered for 24 hours. The clearing batch from the processor was expected by 03:00 UTC but has not arrived. raw_txn_clearing, int_txn_clearing, and cur_txn_clearing have not been refreshed since 2026-06-05 03:00:00. Settlement matching for the previous business day cannot complete. Merchant payout calculations are delayed. The processor's operations team has been contacted.
incidents.resolution_notes: Processor infrastructure outage delayed clearing file by 28 hours. File delivered after processor restored systems. Pipeline backfilled. RAW, INT, CUR refreshed. Row counts reconciled against processor control totals. Added 6-hour file-arrival SLA alert for clearing feed.

incidents._mock_note: DC-DQ-17 | Transaction Clearing | Missing data - completeness duplicate drop
incidents.short_description: cur_txn_clearing short 3,100 records after dedup removed valid clearing reversals
incidents.description: Missing data: 3,100 records are missing from cur_txn_clearing. The INT-to-CUR deduplication logic incorrectly identified clearing reversal records as duplicates because they share the same clearing_txn_id as the original clearing record. The STTM defines the grain as clearing_txn_id but reversals reuse the original ID with a different clearing_type_cd. The dedup logic was not accounting for clearing_type_cd. Settlement reconciliation shows a 3,100-record shortfall. Refund and chargeback processing are affected.

incidents._mock_note: DC-DQ-18 | Merchant Master | Missing data - completeness
incidents.short_description: cur_merchant_master missing 400 new merchants - merchant_id values rejected by DQ length check
incidents.description: Missing data: 400 newly onboarded merchant records are missing from cur_merchant_master. The DQ rules in the STTM specify merchant_id must be exactly 15 characters, but the acquiring bank issued 400 new merchant_id values with 16 characters. These records failed DQ validation during Raw-to-INT and were quarantined. int_merchant_master and cur_merchant_master are missing these merchants. Transaction authorization and clearing enrichment cannot resolve merchant names for 400 merchant_id values.
incidents.resolution_notes: Acquiring bank expanded merchant_id to 16 characters. Updated DQ rule to accept 15 or 16 character merchant_id. Re-processed 400 quarantined records. RAW, INT, CUR reconciled. Updated STTM documentation with new length specification.

incidents._mock_note: DC-DQ-19 | Merchant Master | Missing data - timeliness
incidents.short_description: int_merchant_master stale 3 days - API extract returning empty response
incidents.description: Missing data: the Debit Card Merchant Master API extract has been returning empty responses for 3 consecutive days. raw_merchant_master has received zero new or updated records since 2026-06-01. int_merchant_master and cur_merchant_master are stale. New merchant onboardings and merchant category code (MCC) updates from the last 3 days are not reflected. Transaction enrichment is using outdated merchant names and MCC codes. The merchant data API endpoint returns HTTP 200 but with an empty payload.

incidents._mock_note: DC-DQ-20 | Fraud Alerts | Missing data - completeness
incidents.short_description: cur_fraud_alerts missing 1,200 high-risk alerts - fraud_alert_id sequence gap detected
incidents.description: Missing data: a fraud_alert_id sequence gap analysis detected 1,200 missing high-risk fraud alert records in cur_fraud_alerts. The alerts were generated by the fraud detection engine but were not included in the daily extract because the extraction query used an incorrect date filter. The filter referenced created_date instead of alert_timestamp, missing alerts generated near midnight UTC. These 1,200 alerts span the 2026-05-14 to 2026-05-16 window. Fraud investigation workflows are missing these cases.
incidents.resolution_notes: Source extraction query used wrong date column. Source team corrected query to filter on alert_timestamp instead of created_date. 1,200 missing alerts re-extracted and backfilled. RAW, INT, CUR reconciled. Sequence gap monitoring confirmed no further gaps. Added daily sequence continuity check on fraud_alert_id.

incidents._mock_note: DC-DQ-21 | Fraud Alerts | Missing data - timeliness
incidents.short_description: int_fraud_alerts 10-hour lag - vendor fraud detection platform undergoing upgrade
incidents.description: Missing data: the Debit Card Fraud Alerts feed has a 10-hour lag. The vendor fraud detection platform is undergoing a planned upgrade but the data extract was not paused gracefully. The last fraud_alert_id received is 10 hours behind real time. raw_fraud_alerts, int_fraud_alerts, and cur_fraud_alerts are stale. Real-time fraud case management and alert triage workflows are running on outdated data. The vendor confirmed the upgrade should complete within 4 hours.
incidents.resolution_notes: Vendor platform upgrade completed. Fraud alert feed resumed. 10-hour backlog of alerts streamed and processed. RAW, INT, CUR refreshed. Sequence gap check confirmed no missing alerts. Awaiting fraud operations team sign-off before closing.

incidents._mock_note: DC-DQ-22 | Chargeback Case | Missing data - completeness
incidents.short_description: cur_chargeback_case missing 340 records - chargeback_case_id null for international disputes
incidents.description: Missing data: 340 chargeback case records are missing from cur_chargeback_case. The records were quarantined during Raw-to-INT DQ validation because chargeback_case_id was null. Investigation shows the null values correspond to international dispute cases where the acquiring processor uses a different case identifier format. The STTM defines chargeback_case_id as the primary business key. These 340 cases are not visible in the chargeback management dashboard. Dispute resolution timelines for international cases are not being tracked.

incidents._mock_note: DC-DQ-23 | Chargeback Case | Missing data - timeliness
incidents.short_description: Chargeback Case daily feed 48 hours overdue - processor dispute system migration
incidents.description: Missing data: the Debit Card Chargeback Case daily feed has not been delivered for 48 hours. The processor is migrating their dispute management system and the chargeback extract job was not included in the migration cutover plan. raw_chargeback_case, int_chargeback_case, and cur_chargeback_case have not been refreshed since 2026-05-22. Dispute aging reports are 2 days stale. Regulatory response deadlines for active chargebacks may be missed if data is not restored soon.
incidents.resolution_notes: Processor dispute system migration did not include chargeback extract in cutover. Processor restored extract job on new system. 48 hours of chargeback cases backfilled. RAW, INT, CUR reconciled. No regulatory deadlines were missed. Added chargeback feed to processor's migration checklist for future system changes.

incidents._mock_note: DC-DQ-24 | Chargeback Case | Missing data - completeness partial batch
incidents.short_description: int_chargeback_case short 180 records - file transfer interrupted at 92% completion
incidents.description: Missing data: the Debit Card Chargeback Case file transfer was interrupted at approximately 92% completion. 180 of the expected 2,300 chargeback records did not land in raw_chargeback_case. The SFTP transfer log shows a network timeout at byte offset 4,812,000 of 5,230,000. int_chargeback_case and cur_chargeback_case are missing these 180 records. The missing records include chargebacks initiated in the last 4 hours of the business day.
incidents.resolution_notes: Network timeout during SFTP transfer. Re-transferred complete file. 180 missing records loaded. RAW, INT, CUR reconciled against processor control totals. Added file checksum validation to detect incomplete transfers before pipeline trigger.

incidents._mock_note: DC-DQ-25 | ATM Activity | Missing data - completeness
incidents.short_description: cur_atm_activity missing 6,200 records - atm_txn_id count mismatch vs ATM switch totals
incidents.description: Missing data: the Debit Card ATM Activity segment shows 6,200 records missing from cur_atm_activity compared to the ATM switch control totals. The daily feed delivered 78,000 records but only 71,800 reached the CUR layer. The Raw-to-INT transformation is dropping records where the terminal_id foreign key does not match any terminal_id in int_pos_terminal_master. These 6,200 ATM transactions occurred at newly installed terminals whose master records have not yet been loaded. ATM utilization and cash forecasting reports are incomplete.

incidents._mock_note: DC-DQ-26 | ATM Activity | Missing data - timeliness
incidents.short_description: raw_atm_activity not refreshed 3 days - ATM network switch undergoing firmware update
incidents.description: Missing data: the Debit Card ATM Activity feed has not been delivered for 3 consecutive days. The ATM network switch is undergoing a firmware update that disabled the transaction log export. raw_atm_activity, int_atm_activity, and cur_atm_activity have not been refreshed since 2026-04-12. ATM cash management, utilization reporting, and suspicious activity monitoring are running on 3-day-old data. The ATM operations team confirmed the firmware update is expected to complete within 24 hours.
incidents.resolution_notes: ATM switch firmware update completed. Transaction log export re-enabled. 3 days of ATM activity data backfilled. RAW, INT, CUR reconciled. All atm_txn_id records accounted for. Added ATM switch maintenance window to feed monitoring calendar.

incidents._mock_note: DC-DQ-27 | ATM Activity | Missing data - completeness null terminal
incidents.short_description: int_atm_activity 3,800 records quarantined - atm_txn_id present but terminal_id null from source
incidents.description: Missing data: 3,800 ATM Activity records were quarantined during Raw-to-INT DQ validation because terminal_id was null. The atm_txn_id values are present and valid but the source ATM switch sent null terminal_id for transactions processed through a backup routing path during a network failover event. The STTM DQ rules flag terminal_id as mandatory. These 3,800 ATM transactions are missing from int_atm_activity and cur_atm_activity. Cash withdrawal and deposit volumes at affected ATMs are underreported.

incidents._mock_note: DC-DQ-28 | POS Terminal Master | Missing data - completeness
incidents.short_description: cur_pos_terminal_master missing 250 new terminals - terminal_id format validation failure
incidents.description: Missing data: 250 newly deployed POS terminal records are missing from cur_pos_terminal_master. The terminal_id values for these new terminals use an updated 12-digit format while the STTM DQ rule validates for the legacy 10-digit format. Records were quarantined during Raw-to-INT validation. int_pos_terminal_master and cur_pos_terminal_master do not include these 250 terminals. Transaction authorization and clearing enrichment cannot resolve terminal details for transactions at these locations.

incidents._mock_note: DC-DQ-29 | POS Terminal Master | Missing data - timeliness
incidents.short_description: int_pos_terminal_master stale 5 days - vendor terminal registry API deprecated endpoint
incidents.description: Missing data: the Debit Card POS Terminal Master feed has not been refreshed for 5 days. The vendor's terminal registry API endpoint used by the extraction pipeline was deprecated without advance notice. The API returns HTTP 410 Gone. raw_pos_terminal_master, int_pos_terminal_master, and cur_pos_terminal_master are stale. New terminal deployments and terminal decommissions from the last 5 days are not reflected. Transaction enrichment is using outdated terminal location and capability data.
incidents.resolution_notes: Vendor deprecated terminal registry API endpoint. Migrated extraction pipeline to vendor's v2 API endpoint. 5 days of terminal updates backfilled. RAW, INT, CUR reconciled. 250 new terminals and 18 decommissions now reflected. Added API version monitoring to detect future deprecations.

incidents._mock_note: DC-DQ-30 | Rewards Enrollment | Missing data - completeness
incidents.short_description: cur_rewards_enrollment missing 1,600 records - rewards_enrollment_id duplicates caused merge failure
incidents.description: Missing data: 1,600 records are missing from cur_rewards_enrollment. The INT-to-CUR merge step failed for these records because duplicate rewards_enrollment_id values were detected. The source system's rewards platform re-issued enrollment IDs during a database migration, creating 1,600 duplicate enrollment_id values across old and new enrollments. The STTM defines rewards_enrollment_id as the primary business key with a uniqueness constraint. The merge rejected the new records to protect data integrity. Rewards points accrual and redemption reporting are incomplete for affected cardholders.

incidents._mock_note: BS-PL-01 | Trade Execution RAW ingest failure
incidents.short_description: (AutoTkt) PL-BS-01-TRADE-EXECUTION-RAW-INGEST failure in ADF
incidents.description: Automated alert: the ADF pipeline PL-BS-01-TRADE-EXECUTION-RAW-INGEST failed during its scheduled run. The copy activity for the Black Swan Trade Execution segment could not retrieve trade_execution_extract.dat from the source SFTP within the ingest window. No data landed for int_black_swan.trade_execution and cur_black_swan.trade_execution is stale. Downstream position reconciliation depends on this feed.

incidents._mock_note: BS-PL-02 | Position Master daily load timeout
incidents.short_description: (AutoTkt) PL-BS-02-POSITION-MASTER-DAILY-LOAD copy activity timeout
incidents.description: Automated alert: the ADF copy activity in PL-BS-02-POSITION-MASTER-DAILY-LOAD timed out after 45 minutes. The Black Swan Position Master source system was unresponsive during the extraction window. The position_master_daily.dat file was not retrieved. int_black_swan.position_master and cur_black_swan.position_master remain stale. Risk reporting downstream is blocked.

incidents._mock_note: BS-PL-03 | Risk Metrics INT-to-CUR concurrent write conflict
incidents.short_description: PL-BS-03-RISK-METRICS-INT-CUR ConcurrentAppendException during delta merge
incidents.description: The Black Swan Risk Metrics INT-to-CUR delta merge step for cur_black_swan.risk_metrics threw a ConcurrentAppendException. The merge was processing risk_metrics_daily.dat records when an overlapping Databricks job attempted to write to the same Delta table partition. VaR calculations and stress test results did not reach the Curated layer.

incidents._mock_note: BS-PL-04 | Market Data Feed schema validation failure
incidents.short_description: (AutoTkt) PL-BS-04-MARKET-DATA-FEED-INGEST schema validation failure - 4 new columns
incidents.description: Automated alert: the ADF pipeline PL-BS-04-MARKET-DATA-FEED-INGEST failed on schema validation for Black Swan Market Data Feed. The source file market_data_feed.dat added 4 new columns not present in the STTM. The STTM for Black Swan defines 42 raw attributes for the MARKET_DATA_FEED segment but the source now sends 46. int_black_swan.market_data_feed was not refreshed.

incidents._mock_note: BS-PL-05 | Settlement Ledger RAW connection pool exhausted
incidents.short_description: (AutoTkt) PL-BS-05-SETTLEMENT-LEDGER-RAW connection pool exhausted
incidents.description: Automated alert: PL-BS-05-SETTLEMENT-LEDGER-RAW failed because the JDBC connection pool to the Black Swan Settlement Ledger source was exhausted. All 20 connections were consumed by long-running queries from another process. The settlement_ledger_extract.dat file could not be generated. RAW layer for int_black_swan.settlement_ledger has no fresh data.

incidents._mock_note: BS-PL-06 | Counterparty Profile auth token expired
incidents.short_description: (AutoTkt) PL-BS-06-COUNTERPARTY-PROFILE-REFRESH authentication failure
incidents.description: Automated alert: PL-BS-06-COUNTERPARTY-PROFILE-REFRESH could not authenticate to the Black Swan Counterparty Profile API. The OAuth2 service principal token expired and the key vault secret was not rotated. The counterparty_profile_api response returned HTTP 401. int_black_swan.counterparty_profile was not refreshed. Credit risk downstream models are using stale counterparty data.

incidents._mock_note: BS-PL-07 | Margin Calc INT-CUR transformation error
incidents.short_description: PL-BS-07-MARGIN-CALC-INT-CUR transformation logic error in margin computation
incidents.description: The Black Swan Margin Calculations INT-to-CUR pipeline PL-BS-07-MARGIN-CALC-INT-CUR failed during the transformation step. A Spark UDF computing initial margin threw ArithmeticException: division by zero when notional_amount was zero for 340 derivative contracts. The STTM expects notional_amount > 0 but the source sent zero values after a contract amendment batch.

incidents._mock_note: BS-PL-08 | Portfolio Valuations source maintenance overlap
incidents.short_description: (AutoTkt) PL-BS-08-PORTFOLIO-VAL-DAILY source unreachable during maintenance
incidents.description: Automated alert: PL-BS-08-PORTFOLIO-VAL-DAILY failed because the Black Swan Portfolio Valuations source system was in a maintenance window that overlapped with the ADF extraction schedule. The source returned HTTP 503 for 90 minutes. portfolio_valuations_eod.dat was not delivered. cur_black_swan.portfolio_valuations NAV figures are stale by one business day.

incidents._mock_note: BS-PL-09 | Trade Execution INT-CUR Kafka consumer lag
incidents.short_description: PL-BS-01-TRADE-EXECUTION-INT-CUR Kafka consumer lag on trade events topic
incidents.description: The Black Swan Trade Execution INT-to-CUR streaming pipeline has accumulated 2.4M messages of consumer lag on the bs-trade-events Kafka topic. The consumer group fell behind after a broker rebalance caused by a node failure. Real-time trade positions in cur_black_swan.trade_execution are delayed by approximately 3 hours. Intraday risk limits dashboard is showing outdated positions.

incidents._mock_note: BS-PL-10 | Regulatory Reporting cluster resource exhaustion
incidents.short_description: (AutoTkt) PL-BS-09-REG-REPORTING-EXTRACT Databricks cluster OOM failure
incidents.description: Automated alert: PL-BS-09-REG-REPORTING-EXTRACT failed with OutOfMemoryError on the Black Swan Databricks cluster. The Regulatory Reporting extraction job exceeded the 256GB memory allocation when processing end-of-quarter CCAR stress test scenarios. The cluster auto-scaled to maximum 16 nodes but the data volume exceeded capacity. reg_reporting_extract.dat was not generated.

incidents._mock_note: BS-PL-11 | Liquidity Monitor SSL cert expired
incidents.short_description: (AutoTkt) PL-BS-10-LIQUIDITY-MONITOR-FEED SSL certificate expired
incidents.description: Automated alert: PL-BS-10-LIQUIDITY-MONITOR-FEED failed with SSLHandshakeException. The TLS certificate for the Black Swan Liquidity Monitoring source endpoint expired at 2026-06-23T00:00:00Z. The pipeline cannot establish a secure connection to retrieve liquidity_monitor_feed.dat. Cash position and liquidity coverage ratio data is not flowing to int_black_swan.liquidity_monitoring.

incidents._mock_note: BS-PL-12 | Position Master INT-CUR memory overflow
incidents.short_description: PL-BS-02-POSITION-MASTER-INT-CUR Spark executor memory overflow during aggregation
incidents.description: The Black Swan Position Master INT-to-CUR pipeline PL-BS-02-POSITION-MASTER-INT-CUR failed with ExecutorLostFailure. The Spark job ran out of memory during the position aggregation step that groups by (instrument_id, book_id, valuation_date). The INT table int_black_swan.position_master has grown 3x since last month due to new instrument onboarding. CUR layer positions are not refreshed.

incidents._mock_note: BS-PL-13 | Market Data Feed API rate limit
incidents.short_description: (AutoTkt) PL-BS-04-MARKET-DATA-FEED-INT-CUR rate limiter throttled
incidents.description: Automated alert: PL-BS-04-MARKET-DATA-FEED-INT-CUR was throttled by the Black Swan Market Data Feed vendor API rate limiter. The pipeline received HTTP 429 responses after exceeding 10,000 requests/minute during the end-of-day price refresh. Only 60% of ticker symbols were processed before the timeout. cur_black_swan.market_data_feed has partial coverage for today's closing prices.

incidents._mock_note: BS-PL-14 | Settlement Ledger FK constraint violation
incidents.short_description: PL-BS-05-SETTLEMENT-LEDGER-INT-CUR foreign key constraint violation on counterparty_id
incidents.description: The Black Swan Settlement Ledger INT-to-CUR pipeline PL-BS-05-SETTLEMENT-LEDGER-INT-CUR failed with a foreign key constraint violation. 1,200 settlement records reference counterparty_id values that do not exist in cur_black_swan.counterparty_profile. The counterparty onboarding system added new counterparties that have not yet been ingested through PL-BS-06. The dependency between settlement and counterparty pipelines is not sequenced.

incidents._mock_note: BS-PL-15 | Risk Metrics source format change
incidents.short_description: (AutoTkt) PL-BS-03-RISK-METRICS-RAW-INGEST source file format changed
incidents.description: Automated alert: PL-BS-03-RISK-METRICS-RAW-INGEST failed because the Black Swan Risk Metrics source file changed format from pipe-delimited CSV to Parquet without prior notice. The ADF copy activity expected a delimited text source but received a binary Parquet file. The pipeline's source dataset definition needs to be updated. int_black_swan.risk_metrics RAW layer has no fresh data.

incidents._mock_note: BS-DQ-01 | Trade Execution - missing records, null trade_id
incidents.short_description: Black Swan Trade Execution - 12,000 records missing due to null trade_id
incidents.description: Missing data: 12,000 records are missing from cur_black_swan.trade_execution. The INT-to-CUR merge step dropped records where trade_id was null. The STTM defines trade_id as the primary business key for the Black Swan Trade Execution segment. The source system's trade capture platform generated null trade_id values during a batch amendment run. P&L attribution downstream is incomplete for affected trades.

incidents._mock_note: BS-DQ-02 | Position Master - stale data, not refreshed
incidents.short_description: Black Swan Position Master cur_black_swan.position_master not refreshed since 2 days
incidents.description: Stale data: cur_black_swan.position_master has not been refreshed for 2 business days. The max(position_date) in the CUR table is 2026-06-13 while today is 2026-06-15. The Black Swan Position Master daily extract completed successfully but the INT-to-CUR job was not triggered due to an ADF trigger misconfiguration. Portfolio managers are making decisions on outdated position data.

incidents._mock_note: BS-DQ-03 | Risk Metrics - negative notional values in VaR
incidents.short_description: Black Swan Risk Metrics - VaR calculations contain negative notional amounts
incidents.description: Data quality issue: 340 records in cur_black_swan.risk_metrics have negative notional_amount values in the VaR calculation output. The STTM for Black Swan Risk Metrics defines notional_amount as unsigned decimal. The source system sent negative values after a contract amendment batch reversed positions. Risk limits monitoring is generating false positive breach alerts.

incidents._mock_note: BS-DQ-04 | Market Data Feed - incomplete ticker coverage
incidents.short_description: Black Swan Market Data Feed - 300 ticker symbols missing from daily feed
incidents.description: Incomplete data: 300 ticker symbols are missing from today's Black Swan Market Data Feed in cur_black_swan.market_data_feed. The source vendor's end-of-day pricing file excluded tickers listed on 3 regional exchanges due to a vendor-side filter misconfiguration. The STTM expects 4,200 unique ticker_symbol values but only 3,900 were received. Valuation models for affected instruments are using T-1 prices.

incidents._mock_note: BS-DQ-05 | Settlement Ledger - duplicate settlement_id values
incidents.short_description: Black Swan Settlement Ledger - 8,500 duplicate settlement_id values in CUR
incidents.description: Data quality issue: 8,500 duplicate settlement_id values detected in cur_black_swan.settlement_ledger. The source system's clearing platform re-issued settlement IDs during a netting cycle correction. The STTM defines settlement_id as the primary business key with a uniqueness constraint. The INT-to-CUR merge inserted both old and new records because the merge key matched on (settlement_id, settlement_date) which was unique. Settlement reconciliation reports show inflated volumes.

incidents._mock_note: BS-DQ-06 | Counterparty Profile - LEI code mismatch
incidents.short_description: Black Swan Counterparty Profile - LEI codes mismatched between source and target
incidents.description: Data quality issue: 45 counterparty records in cur_black_swan.counterparty_profile have LEI (Legal Entity Identifier) codes that do not match the GLEIF registry. The source system updated LEI codes after corporate restructuring events but the old LEI values persist in 45 records. Regulatory reporting requires accurate LEI mapping for counterparty identification under EMIR and Dodd-Frank.

incidents._mock_note: BS-DQ-07 | Margin Calculations - row count mismatch
incidents.short_description: Black Swan Margin Calculations - cur_black_swan.margin_requirements row count mismatch
incidents.description: Missing data: source-to-target reconciliation flagged a row count mismatch for Black Swan Margin Calculations. The daily extract had 28,000 margin requirement records but only 24,100 landed in cur_black_swan.margin_requirements. 3,900 records were dropped during INT-to-CUR transformation because the margin_account_id foreign key referenced accounts not yet onboarded in cur_black_swan.counterparty_profile. Margin call calculations are understated.

incidents._mock_note: BS-DQ-08 | Portfolio Valuations - NAV stale 3 days
incidents.short_description: Black Swan Portfolio Valuations - NAV values unchanged for 3 business days
incidents.description: Stale data: NAV (Net Asset Value) figures in cur_black_swan.portfolio_valuations have not changed for 3 consecutive business days. The max(valuation_date) shows 2026-06-17 but current date is 2026-06-20. The Black Swan Portfolio Valuations EOD feed completed but the CUR layer merge is using an outdated watermark that filters out new records. Fund performance reporting is based on stale NAV data.

incidents._mock_note: BS-DQ-09 | Trade Execution - T+1 settlement records not landed
incidents.short_description: Black Swan Trade Execution - T+1 settlement records not landed in CUR
incidents.description: Missing data: T+1 settlement records for Black Swan Trade Execution have not landed in cur_black_swan.trade_execution. 6,200 trades executed on 2026-06-20 should have their settlement_status updated to 'Settled' by T+1 (2026-06-21) but the settlement confirmation feed was not processed. The settlement matching engine output was delivered to the wrong SFTP directory. Trade lifecycle tracking is incomplete.

incidents._mock_note: BS-DQ-10 | Position Master - derivative positions zero delta
incidents.short_description: Black Swan Position Master - 1,800 derivative positions showing zero delta
incidents.description: Data quality issue: 1,800 derivative positions in cur_black_swan.position_master are showing delta = 0.0 which is mathematically incorrect for in-the-money options. The source system's Greek calculation engine failed to compute sensitivities for these positions after a model recalibration. The zero delta values were ingested as-is since the STTM does not enforce range validation on Greek fields. Hedging decisions are being made on incorrect delta values.

incidents._mock_note: BS-DQ-11 | Regulatory Reporting - CCAR data incomplete
incidents.short_description: Black Swan Regulatory Reporting - CCAR stress test data elements incomplete
incidents.description: Incomplete data: the Black Swan Regulatory Reporting CCAR submission dataset in cur_black_swan.reg_reporting is missing 5 newly required data elements mandated by the latest Fed SR letter. The STTM was updated to include the new fields but the source system has not yet started populating them. The 5 fields (projected_loss_rate, capital_buffer_pct, leverage_ratio_stressed, tier1_capital_stressed, risk_weighted_assets_stressed) are all null. CCAR submission deadline is approaching.

incidents._mock_note: BS-DQ-12 | Liquidity Monitoring - cash flow projections stale
incidents.short_description: Black Swan Liquidity Monitoring - cash flow projections stale by 48 hours
incidents.description: Stale data: Black Swan Liquidity Monitoring cash flow projection data in cur_black_swan.liquidity_monitoring has not been refreshed for 48 hours. The liquidity_coverage_ratio and net_stable_funding_ratio calculations are based on projections from 2026-06-21 while current date is 2026-06-23. The intraday liquidity feed stopped publishing after the source system's batch scheduler was paused for capacity planning. Treasury is operating without current liquidity visibility.

incidents._mock_note: BS-DQ-13 | Settlement Ledger - cross-currency FX rates missing
incidents.short_description: Black Swan Settlement Ledger - cross-currency settlements missing FX rates
incidents.description: Missing data: 2,100 cross-currency settlement records in cur_black_swan.settlement_ledger have null fx_rate values. The Black Swan FX rate reference feed that populates the lookup table was not delivered for 2026-06-24. Settlements in EUR, GBP, and JPY cannot be converted to USD base currency. The downstream P&L aggregation pipeline skips records with null fx_rate, understating total settlement volumes by approximately 15%.

incidents._mock_note: BS-DQ-14 | Market Data Feed - EOD prices not refreshed
incidents.short_description: Black Swan Market Data Feed - end-of-day prices not refreshed for 2026-06-25
incidents.description: Stale data: end-of-day closing prices in cur_black_swan.market_data_feed have not been refreshed. The max(price_date) is 2026-06-24 but markets closed on 2026-06-25. The Black Swan Market Data Feed vendor's EOD file delivery was delayed beyond the ingest window cutoff. 4,200 ticker symbols are showing yesterday's closing prices. Mark-to-market valuations for the entire Black Swan portfolio are based on stale prices.

incidents._mock_note: BS-DQ-15 | Risk Metrics - stress test scenarios missing parameters
incidents.short_description: Black Swan Risk Metrics - stress test scenarios missing 5 new shock parameters
incidents.description: Incomplete data: the Black Swan Risk Metrics stress test output in cur_black_swan.risk_metrics is missing 5 newly defined shock parameters (credit_spread_shock_bp, equity_vol_shock_pct, ir_curve_shift_bp, fx_spot_shock_pct, commodity_price_shock_pct). The risk engine was updated to compute these parameters but the source extract file risk_metrics_daily.dat does not include them yet. The STTM was updated to expect 47 attributes but the source still sends 42. Stress test coverage is incomplete for the latest regulatory scenario set.
